name: Senior Engineering Manager
text: Aren consistently delivers high-quality code and takes ownership of complex features. His work on real-time data streaming systems has been instrumental to our team's success.

name: Technical Lead
text: A quick learner who dives deep into problems. Aren's contributions to our C++ codebase and CI/CD pipelines have significantly improved our development velocity.

name: Staff Engineer
text: Aren brought fresh perspectives to our embedded systems work. His attention to detail and debugging skills made him a valuable contributor to mission-critical projects.

name: Team Lead
text: One of the most proactive engineers I've worked with. Aren's ability to learn new technologies quickly and apply them effectively set him apart from his peers.

name: Peer Engineer
text: Great collaborator and problem-solver. Aren is the go-to person when you need someone to debug a tricky issue or review complex code with fresh eyes.
